reference: Hello, in my opinion, the problem of the numb patch in the knee is related to the slipped disc at the L3-four level. Start a combination of pregabalin and methylcobalamin, along with painkillers, and get a magnetic resonance imaging of the lower back to confirm the diagnosis and assess the size of the disc prolapse.
text: Hello, in my opinion, the problem of the numb patch in the knee is related to the slipped disc at the L3/4 level. Start a combination of pregabalin and methylcobalamin along with painkillers, and get a magnetic resonance imaging of the lower back to confirm the diagnosis and assess the size of the disc prolapse.
